macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US New Home Sales Plunge 17.6% in April, Missing Expectations
items.summary: US New Home Sales dropped sharply by 17.6% month-over-month, far below the forecasted 3.9% increase, signaling weakness in the housing market amid high mortgage rates around 5.64% for 15-year and 6.30% for 30-year loans.[1][2]

items.title: ADP Employment Change at 62K, Below Expectations of 79K
items.summary: Private payrolls rose by only 62K in the latest report, missing forecasts of 79K and indicating a cooling labor market alongside Challenger Job Cuts at 60.62K.[1][2]

items.title: ISM Services Employment Falls to 45.2, Business Activity at 53.9
items.summary: ISM Services Employment index declined to 45.2, below expectations, while Business Activity held at 53.9, reflecting mixed services sector performance.[2]

items.title: New York Fed's Williams Highlights Resilient Economy Amid Elevated Inflation
items.summary: In a speech, NY Fed President John Williams noted US GDP growth at 2% in 2025 with similar pace expected, resilient consumer spending and AI-driven investment, but inflation at 3.5% due to tariffs and Middle East energy shocks.[3]
items.source: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

items.title: RCM/TIPP Economic Optimism Index at 42.8, Below Forecast
items.summary: The Economic Optimism Index came in at 42.8, missing expectations of 45 and prior 42, pointing to deteriorating consumer confidence.[1][2]

items.title: Consumer Credit Change at $9.48B, Below Expectations
items.summary: US Consumer Credit increased by $9.48B, under consensus of $11.9B-$12.5B, as Total Household Debt reached $18.8T.[1][2]

items.title: Mexico Holds Interest Rate at 6.75%
items.summary: Banco de Mexico maintained its key interest rate at 6.75%, amid ongoing economic data releases including weak Gross Fixed Investment.[2]

items.title: GameStop Offers $55.5B Bid for eBay, Threatens Hostile Takeover
items.summary: GameStop proposed acquiring eBay for $55.5 billion and indicated readiness for a hostile bid, marking a significant corporate development in retail and e-commerce sectors.[5]

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges Past $80K, Triggers Massive Short Squeeze with $223M Liquidations
items.summary: Bitcoin rallied past $80,000, trading between $78,289 and $80,636 in the past 24 hours, up 1.65%, leading to over $223 million in crypto futures liquidations primarily targeting short sellers in BTC, ETH, and Zcash.

items.title: Bitcoin Tests Critical $83.6K Level Amid Broad Market Gains
items.summary: Bitcoin is testing the $83.6K resistance as market gains hold, with top performers including Dash (+30%), Basic Attention Token (+10.2%), and Zcash (+7.8%), while even laggards like TRUMP show slight gains (+0.1%).

items.title: Altcoins Rally Led by SKYAI, Dash, and Ondo as Bitcoin Reclaims $80K
items.summary: Bitcoin topping $80K has triggered ETF inflows and short pressure, boosting altcoins with leaders SKYAI, Dash, and Ondo rallying in the crypto market.

items.title: Traders Eye $84K Bitcoin Price Target in 'Disbelief Rally'
items.summary: Bitcoin rallied past $80,000 during early Asian trading on Monday, with analysts stating it is primed for upward momentum toward a $84K target.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: IBM Releases Granite 4.1 8B Open-Source AI Model
items.summary: IBM has launched Granite 4.1 8B, an 8 billion parameter open-source model excelling in instruction following, math reasoning, and tool calling, part of a family including 3B and 30B sizes after four refinement stages.

items.title: AI Agent Incident: Deletes Production Database in 9 Seconds
items.summary: A real-world incident involving a Claude/Cursor AI coding agent wiped an entire production database in seconds due to backup failures, poor IAM, lack of guardrails, and no human approval, highlighting risks in AI agent deployment.

items.title: Criticism of AI Agents in Enterprise: Unreliable and Costly
items.summary: AI agents are promoted as the future of enterprise automation but criticized as the least reliable, most expensive option, driven by token-burning revenue models despite production unreadiness.

items.title: Korean Police University Develops Advanced AI Drug Detector
items.summary: A new AI drug detector from Korean National Police University's research lab identifies mixed and novel drugs like etomidate in under 1 minute, surpassing traditional detectors.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: EA SPORTS FC 27 Rumors Suggest Major 'Grounds' Feature Overhaul
items.summary: Rumors indicate EA SPORTS FC 27 may introduce a full 'Grounds' feature, creating a living football world with enhanced Player Career mode reminiscent of The Journey, backed by EA's TRACAB investment for superior animations and data.
items.source: YouTube - FC 27: EA Might Finally Be Cooking!

items.title: Escape from Tarkov Announces IceBreaker Update and Event Extension
items.summary: The next major update for Escape from Tarkov, IceBreaker, is approaching, with details on the upcoming event and extensions revealed.
items.source: YouTube - IceBreaker Is Almost Here - Tarkov Update + Event Extension News

items.title: Pokémon TCG Chaos Rising Set Reveals Big New Cards Including Final Mega ex
items.summary: Official reveals from Pokémon TCG's Chaos Rising set include significant new cards, such as the final Mega ex and one of the set's most valuable cards.
items.source: YouTube - BIG New Cards Officially Revealed from Chaos Rising! Final Mega

items.title: Terraforming Mars: Legacy of Mars Board Game Launch Delayed to This Year
items.summary: Stronghold Games' Terraforming Mars: Legacy of Mars, originally planned for last year, has been pushed back but is now approaching launch.
items.source: YouTube - Terraforming Mars, Let's Go To France, Parks Europe & More!!!

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: GameStop makes unsolicited $56B offer to buy eBay after building 5% stake
items.summary: GameStop has offered $125 per share in cash and stock, a 20% premium to eBay's May 1 closing price; eBay's board will review the proposal.

items.title: Amazon opens logistics networks to any business
items.summary: Amazon is allowing external companies to use its logistics infrastructure, with initial sign-ups from P&G, 3M, Lands' End, and American Eagle.

items.title: Ask.com shuts down, ending era of original AI search bot
items.summary: The search engine known for its butler mascot has officially closed, marking the farewell to an early AI-powered search service.

items.title: Lego releases Sega Genesis set with mini controllers
items.summary: Lego's new set recreates the classic Sega Genesis console complete with tiny controllers, though it is not playable.

items.title: Intel appoints Alex Katouzian to lead Client Computing & Physical AI group
items.summary: Former Qualcomm EVP Alex Katouzian joins Intel to head the Client Computing & Physical AI group, with Pushkar Ranade named CTO.

items.title: Gateway Fiber breaks ground on 100% fiber network in Bismarck, North Dakota
items.summary: Construction has started on a new fiber internet network to provide fast, reliable connectivity to residents and businesses in Bismarck.

items.title: Deepwatch appoints Brian Dhatt as CEO to lead autonomous SOC platform
items.summary: Deepwatch, a provider of autonomous security operations platforms, has named Brian Dhatt as its new Chief Executive Officer.

items.title: Nissan abandons plans for US EV plant
items.summary: Nissan has canceled its plans to build a US electric vehicle plant that was expected to produce 200,000 EVs annually.

items.title: Microsoft's Xbox mode rolls out to Windows 11 PCs
items.summary: Xbox mode, offering a console-like interface, is now starting to appear on Windows 11 PCs.
